nasb.text: Isaiah the prophet cried to the Lord, and He brought the shadow on the stairway back ten steps by which it had gone down on the stairway of Ahaz.

esv.text: And Isaiah the prophet called to the Lord, and he brought the shadow back ten steps, by which it had gone down on the steps of Ahaz.

cnv.text: 以賽亞先知呼求耶和華，他就使日晷上的日影，就是在亞哈斯的日晷上已經下移的日影倒退了十級。

ccb.text: 以赛亚先知向耶和华祈求，耶和华就使亚哈斯日晷上的日影后退了十度。
